name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: From the AP: States most likely to flip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Minnesota was ranked one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip this November by the Associated Press. That's a list no one wants to be on -- and it's bad news for Senator Tina Smith's campaign.
[**Will you please rush $3 or more to her campaign right now to ensure that Democrats can hang on to Minnesota 's vulnerable Senate seat?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc41b/2a380d31/23de2fd3/f09b05/2307517869/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0dHMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxN19td2g0dHNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ts?refcode=e20200517_mwh4ts_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Donald Trump very nearly won in Minnesota in 2016 -- it came down to just 1.5 points. He knows Minnesota is a purple state, and his campaign is pledging to spend millions to win there and secure a second term.
_**It gets worse.**_
Tina's opponent could ride Trump's coattails to victory -- in fact, that's what Republicans are hoping for. They know that Democrats can't flip the Senate without Minnesota, and it's a must-win state to send Trump packing.
Tina is counting on you, everyone, and she needs your help more than ever before. If she doesn't have the resources to respond to the GOP's nasty attacks, then Republicans could get the advantage they've been looking for.
[**Will you add a donation -- $3 or any amount -- to help us stop Minnesota from flipping red?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc41b/2a380d31/23de2fd3/f09b05/2307517869/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0dHMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxN19td2g0dHNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ts?refcode=e20200517_mwh4ts_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Now is the time to ramp up and prepare for whatever Republicans have in store. **You can donate by clicking any of the links below.**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Tina Smith and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc41b/2a380d31/23de2fd3/f09b06/2307517869/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0dHMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxN19td2g0dHNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ts?refcode=e20200517_mwh4ts_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc41b/2a380d31/23de2fd3/f09b07/2307517869/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0dHMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxN19td2g0dHNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ts?refcode=e20200517_mwh4ts_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc41b/2a380d31/23de2fd3/f09b00/2307517869/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0dHMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxN19td2g0dHNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ts?refcode=e20200517_mwh4ts_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc41b/2a380d31/23de2fd3/f09b01/2307517869/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0dHMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxN19td2g0dHNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ts?refcode=e20200517_mwh4ts_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Thank you,
Team Maggie
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc41b/2a380d31/23de2fd3/f09b05/2307517869/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0dHMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxN19td2g0dHNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ts?refcode=e20200517_mwh4ts_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: Join Your Neighbor! (1️⃣5️⃣ DAYS LEFT)
body:
How will you help lead our grassroots campaign to victory?

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d8nHDqNvZJs&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
Government was created to secure our rights, not violate them. In Congress, I will continue to stand up for our historic constitutional freedoms.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
Hello

It's hard to believe but we have just over 370 hours to make a difference and send a conservative outsider to Congress.

The support our campaign received over the past week has been incredible with new barn signs popping up across the district and yard sign requests pouring in. I'm overwhelmed!

A special thank you to the dozens of volunteers who are fueling the engines of our grassroots army. From stuffing envelopes to making calls to telling your neighbors about our campaign, your efforts are moving the needle in this race.

Could you spare just one of these 370 hours for our campaign?
This election is so close, your help will turbocharge our momentum.
CALL YOUR NEIGHBORS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
With just 15 days to go, more Iowans plan to vote than ever before. Make sure your voice is heard and don't forget to remind those around you to vote as well. If you'll be voting on June 2, be sure to check how many polling places will be open in your county. In many counties across the district, only one polling place will be open.
ABSENTEE BALLOT REQUEST (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/electioninfo/absenteeinfo.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)

Did you see the last two debates? If not, click to watch the KDSN debate (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) and the KICD debate (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lDHU7Gw4Rt8&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) . Please share these links far and wide; it's critical voters know who is looking to represent them. Coming off of two strong showings, I'm confident Iowans will make the right choice in this election.
WATCH THE DEBATE (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&t&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
Since making clear my commitment to debate the issues when others ignored the public (read the press release here (https://caffeinatedthoughts.com/2020/05/richards-calls-on-feenstra-king-to-agree-to-televised-debate/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) ), at least three more forums have been organized. Stay tuned for more updates, but there will be a debate on KTIV this Wednesday and one on WHO 13 on May 28.
CHIP IN $10 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Even during these uncertain times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. With just 15(!) days to go, can you help us share our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home?
LETTER OF SUPPORT
https://richardsforcongress.com/elect-bret-richards-to-iowas-fourth-district-in-congress/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489

Jill Richards, Irwin: "You may be wondering what makes me an expert on this. Well, Bret and I are celebrating our 25th anniversary this month, but we’ve known each other for almost 40 years. Ever since high school, he’s been there for me through the good times and the bad." READ MORE (https://richardsforcongress.com/elect-bret-richards-to-iowas-fourth-district-in-congress/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)

WRITE YOUR OWN LETTER OF SUPPORT (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/candidate-richards-is-tired-of-career-politicians/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489

http://www.algona.com/news/candidate-richards-tired-career-politicians?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
"Another issue he believes in strongly is protecting life from conception until natural death, ending the sale of fetal tissue, and investing in adoption alternatives. 'Protecting God’s gift of life is a very important thing we have to do. We have to find a solution to remove red tape for adoption and give people options to love that baby forever.'"
MISS THE DEBATE?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iIFerpkp4-0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489

Highlights:
* Defending Gun Rights (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YlvTSvDu8UY&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* Draining the Swamp (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CajSnx-JPaQ&t&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* Sticking up for Ethanol (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iIFerpkp4-0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* Balancing the Budget (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kz489BQi6jE&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* or watch the full debate (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TnDm0LUkHe0&t&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)

STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)
* and much more... (https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6ycE8yzCF0tZeOk5rwVMemYssZoNXHy&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489)

GET INVOLVED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RU58q_EtpqU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489
YARD AND BARN SIGNS NOW AVAILABLE! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY!
We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) we still need your help!

Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? Send an email to volunteer@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ebbc50553&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) to lend a hand!

Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/richards4iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=b2cfd25fbb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-b2cfd25fbb-25822489) to stay up to date!

I look forward to hearing from you. Even during these uncertain times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives. I appreciate your continued support. Your neighbor, p.s. With just 15(!) days to go, can you help us share our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home? LETTER OF SUPPORT Jill Richards, Irwin: "You may be wondering what makes me an expert on this. Well, Bret and I are celebrating our 25th anniversary this month, but we’ve known each other for almost 40 years. Ever since high school, he’s been there for me through the good times and the bad." READ MORE () WRITE YOUR OWN LETTER OF SUPPORT () RECENT COVERAGE "Another issue he believes in strongly is protecting life from conception until natural death, ending the sale of fetal tissue, and investing in adoption alternatives. 'Protecting God’s gift of life is a very important thing we have to do. We have to find a solution to remove red tape for adoption and give people options to love that baby forever.'" MISS THE DEBATE? Highlights: Defending Gun Rights () Draining the Swamp () Sticking up for Ethanol () Balancing the Budget () or watch the full debate () STAY INFORMED On the issues: Protecting Life () Lowering Healthcare Costs () Securing the Border () Sticking up for Iowa Energy () and much more... () GET INVOLVED YARD AND BARN SIGNS NOW AVAILABLE! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY! We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate () we still need your help! Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? Send an email to volunteer@richardsforcongress.com () to lend a hand! Be sure to like us on Facebook () and follow us on Twitter () and Instagram () to stay up to date! ============================================================ Copyright © 2019 Richards For Congress, All rights reserved. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Friend, I can’t wait to meet you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m excited to invite you to my conversation with Margaret Good in just two days!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17531905/197708582/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmFlM2M3YS0wODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDcdautrXNI5BYxULOnH8OMEsIZRUQD2HqnxauYZbhM=&emci=71b97509-0599-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=afae3c7a-0899-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Friend,

I’m excited to invite you to my conversation with Margaret Good in just two days!

We’ll be discussing the importance of supporting women as we get them off the sidelines and involved in their communities.

Margaret’s a perfect example of what can be accomplished when we empower women to fight for their communities.

I’m thrilled to join Margaret in the fight to flip Florida’s 16th District.

**[Come join the conversation — you’ll be _In Good Company_!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17531906/197708583/1638746364?contactdata=plnfb0%2B5i69%2Fni42WEIr9UKs%2Fq08T02T%2BuyCphyp86jYwg5WyzSOETFKA8X9rmPleRE%2F8NUu5laxBP3OhoFnZaZe%2FPwnjR5YL8hegesNZi5%2F4ZBIpWSqAFG8Jb5Z2RcdD7FKGMpNTpJJiQS%2FYZfgtw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmFlM2M3YS0wODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDcdautrXNI5BYxULOnH8OMEsIZRUQD2HqnxauYZbhM=&emci=71b97509-0599-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=afae3c7a-0899-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

I can’t wait to see you there,

Kirsten Gillibrand

**[P.S. If you can't join but want to make sure Margaret has the resources she needs to win and flip the 16th District, just go ahead and donate here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17531907/197708584/788213855?refcode=em05182020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmFlM2M3YS0wODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDcdautrXNI5BYxULOnH8OMEsIZRUQD2HqnxauYZbhM=)**

**\---Original Message---**

Hi there,

As one of our campaign’s strongest supporters, we wanted to be sure you knew about this exciting upcoming event — _In Good Company_ — with Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. We hope you'll join us!

Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is a mom, one of New York’s senators, a former presidential candidate, and the founder of Off the Sidelines, a group that encourages women and girls across the country to find their voice, get off the sidelines, and make a difference in their communities. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17531908/197708585/-290028998?attr=113817338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmFlM2M3YS0wODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDcdautrXNI5BYxULOnH8OMEsIZRUQD2HqnxauYZbhM=&emci=71b97509-0599-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=afae3c7a-0899-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) _In Good Company_ brings our campaign to you through insightful conversations with esteemed leaders, colleagues, and friends as we explore issues facing our communities, Florida, and our nation.

These conversations have been so well received that we have expanded the series! However, we are limiting participation to ensure that as many attendees as possible have an opportunity to engage with the speakers, so make sure to register early!

**[RSVP now to secure your spot](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17531909/197708586/-290028998?attr=113817338&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmFlM2M3YS0wODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDcdautrXNI5BYxULOnH8OMEsIZRUQD2HqnxauYZbhM=&emci=71b97509-0599-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=afae3c7a-0899-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

We hope you are enjoying _In Good Company_ , and we hope you'll consider spreading the word about them by forwarding this email to a friend who you know would appreciate these speakers.

See you at _In Good Company_!

Team Good | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17531910/197708587/788213855?refcode=em_ingoodcompany&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmFlM2M3YS0wODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDcdautrXNI5BYxULOnH8OMEsIZRUQD2HqnxauYZbhM=)

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Special offer with Dan Crenshaw!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
We’re working with Dan Crenshaw for a special offer for you! Read more >>
Peter, We have some awesome news! A select few Congresspeople have been given permission to offer their supporters a special offer — a copy of Dan Crenshaw’s new book, including a signed bookplate by Dan himself! Dan’s new book, _Fortitude: American Resilience in the Era of Outrage_ just came out, and it is excellent. We just missed getting signed copies, but Dan has offered to provide our campaign with 100 extra signed bookplates. The first 100 people to donate $100 or more in the next 48 hours will receive a copy of Dan’s book, and a bookplate personally signed by the man himself. I am proud to call Dan a friend and colleague. He is a true American hero who stands up for conservative values and embodies freedom and liberty. **[Donate $100 or more now to get your copy of _Fortitude: American Resilience in the Era of Outrage,_ along with a signed bookplate from Dan Crenshaw](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/98c594b629eefdba/90ce6ba1aaccbcaac3d6b838967d376c/34143).** I can’t wait for you to read it. Remember, supplies are limited, so don’t hesitate! -Kevin Hern [**Get your book now >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/98c594b629eefdba/39efb75174730589c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/98c594b629eefdba/4310d10de77a2455c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/98c594b629eefdba/7dc1289c31bb218fc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

The first 100 people to donate $100 or more in the next 48 hours will receive a copy of Dan’s book, and a bookplate personally signed by the man himself. I am proud to call Dan a friend and colleague. He is a true American hero who stands up for conservative values and embodies freedom and liberty. . I can’t wait for you to read it. Remember, supplies are limited, so don’t hesitate! -Kevin Hern | | | ---|--- id:2020-05-05-16:10:26:360t Paid For By Hern For Congress

Dear Friend, An op-ed piece today asks, "Did the Coronavirus Kill Ideology in Australia?" It goes on to describe how a divisive government recognized the magnitude of the threat and dealt with it appropriately. Prime Minister Scott Morrison is quoted as saying "There are no blue teams or red teams, there are no more unions or bosses. There are just Australians now; that's all that matters." They formed a bi-partisan national cabinet and developed a plan to guide the nation through the crisis. The result? Australia's infection rate per capita is 6% of ours. Their fatality rate is 1.5% of ours. Unemployment was 6.2% in April, forecast to peak at about 10%. Ours was 14.9%, forecast to peak at about 25%. There was never going to be a "good" result of this pandemic. Minimizing the human toll and the economic damage was the "least bad" possible outcome. We have managed to do neither. The Declaration of Independence states that "Governments are instituted among Men" to secure our "unalienable Rights" to "Life, Liberty, and the pursuit of Happiness." We are witnessing an abject failure to fulfill that foundational role of government. You have the right to expect more from you elected officials. **Demand Better. As President Obama said in his graduation speech, "Nobody does great things alone." [I need your help so please pitch in if you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17533226/197730039/-1907457919?refcode=051820_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzVlNjE5Mi0xMDk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oPHK_eZnCxXp18BYA3q9J64CfKaRvbL6pBbvfDvI074=). name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Action Items: NO MORE SPENDING & REOPEN AMERICA!
body:
TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE
THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, MAY 18TH @ 1 P.M. ET » [FB.COM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3BnL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHM_bWlkPTQyMDM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=rGYAmVVzAwQj3ib9OZ7D6A) OR [TPP.US/LIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZT9taWQ9NDIwMzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=hGx7w5P7Xrw3yCT0UCd2UA) | |
---
There are now 36 million unemployed private-sector Americans, while the government class sits at home collecting paychecks, uninterrupted. At the same time, Nancy Pelosi wants to spend over $3 TRILLION that we do not have – and not to solve the crisis, but to implement the radical, left-wing policies that Democrats have been trying to achieve for decades.

Truly, our country’s future – immediate and long-term – depends on patriots like you taking action today. Please look over the action items below and do as many of them as can – hopefully all of them!
**National Day of Action: Call Your Governor!**
**[Call your Governor](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1RQUEEtR292ZXJub3ItQ29udGFjdC1JbmZvcm1hdGlvbi5wZGY_bWlkPTQyMDM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=SOGjgbwfEBhQLGtN9PZHXw)** on Tuesday, May 19th, as part of a nationwide call to action to express one of the following messages:
* If your Governor has begun reopening the state, call to say thank you!
* If your Governor is maintaining the lockdowns, call to say it’s time to reopen!

|
---
**Fill out our Reopening Survey**
**[Fill out this survey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC8xb3lFdUU2Skc3dGp0S0UtTVRlVktqUExJM2JtMDZ6Y0o4MzFFUk1mRnpNZy9lZGl0P21pZD00MjAzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=XmGcycOY_5mTwRAkK67UrQ)** about good stories and successes that are happening in your area. If you are a business owner that has recently been able to reopen, or you are an employee that has been able to go back to work, or you are a customer that has been able to shop or dine somewhere, we need your feedback!
|
---
**Call your GOP Senators**
Senate Republicans also need the support to stand firm against the media and Nancy Pelosi. The media is going to go all out to pressure Republican Senators to cave to Nancy Pelosi’s $3 TRILLION bill. They must hear from their constituents to stand firm. Call with the following messages:
* No more spending
* No state bailouts
* Yes on a payroll tax holiday
* Americans don’t want any version of Nancy Pelosi’s bill in the Senate

|
---
**Sign our petition**
**[Sign this petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvYmFsYW5jZXBhaW4vP21pZD00MjAzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=uKYIQ5s9sxkq1tiQNx4mlw) urging President Trump to support legislation to cut the pay of government employees by 20% during this crisis**, so that bureaucrats and elected officials are not insulated from the consequences of the decisions they are forcing on everyone else.
|
---
_And if you haven’t yet done these items from last week..._
**Fill out and share our COVID-19 quiz**
**[Don’t forget to share our quiz far and wide!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY29yb25hdmlydXMtcXVpei8_bWlkPTQyMDM0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=p-Z3ClEvovg5bcjf3csfHw) **Our hope is that this quiz will help ease people’s fears and reopen our communities!
|
---
**Sign up for our Great American Reopening coalition**
**If you haven’t yet signed up for updates from our Great American Reopening group,[you can sign up here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ncm91cHMuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS9hL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2QvZm9ydW0vZ2FydGVhbS9qb2luP21pZD00MjAzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=SOIclYzxxlGC3zyThyS-Pw).** You’ll get access to new action items, news, and other information about reopening that we don’t send out through our regular email list.
|
---
**Fill out our Lockdown Survey**
**[Please fill out this survey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZmx3Yk1QYmQ1eWJpS0dYVDkwckRrTXNzRjZzb3luaXNIS3dIeG9Fam9BWjBfMjNnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjAzNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=JqcL8pZkQj7684MRvKZfCQ)** about how the lockdowns are affecting you.
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
PS: Just a quick note that **_Created Equal: Clarence Thomas in His Own Words_ , a new film tracing the life story of Associate Justice of the Supreme Court, will be airing on PBS tonight at at 9:00 p.m. ET.** In this documentary, Justice Thomas tells his entire life’s story, looking directly at the camera, speaking frankly to the audience. You don’t want to miss it!
[ CONTRIBUTE ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTM5LWExNTliOGY3Y2M4NjRhZjNiYmU2ZDZlZmU4ZjkwNjhh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDIwMzQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ODGoC3DgyBHh_f8QFXhdVg)
|

clean_body: TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, MAY 18TH @ 1 P.M. ET » OR | | There are now 36 million unemployed private-sector Americans, while the government class sits at home collecting paychecks, uninterrupted. At the same time, Nancy Pelosi wants to spend over $3 TRILLION that we do not have – and not to solve the crisis, but to implement the radical, left-wing policies that Democrats have been trying to achieve for decades. Truly, our country’s future – immediate and long-term – depends on patriots like you taking action today. Please look over the action items below and do as many of them as can – hopefully all of them! National Day of Action: Call Your Governor! on Tuesday, May 19th, as part of a nationwide call to action to express one of the following messages: If your Governor has begun reopening the state, call to say thank you! If your Governor is maintaining the lockdowns, call to say it’s time to reopen! | Fill out our Reopening Survey about good stories and successes that are happening in your area. If you are a business owner that has recently been able to reopen, or you are an employee that has been able to go back to work, or you are a customer that has been able to shop or dine somewhere, we need your feedback! | Call your GOP Senators Senate Republicans also need the support to stand firm against the media and Nancy Pelosi. The media is going to go all out to pressure Republican Senators to cave to Nancy Pelosi’s $3 TRILLION bill. They must hear from their constituents to stand firm. Call with the following messages: No more spending No state bailouts Yes on a payroll tax holiday Americans don’t want any version of Nancy Pelosi’s bill in the Senate | Sign our petition urging President Trump to support legislation to cut the pay of government employees by 20% during this crisis, so that bureaucrats and elected officials are not insulated from the consequences of the decisions they are forcing on everyone else. | And if you haven’t yet done these items from last week... Fill out and share our COVID-19 quiz Our hope is that this quiz will help ease people’s fears and reopen our communities! | Sign up for our Great American Reopening coalition If you haven’t yet signed up for updates from our Great American Reopening group,. You’ll get access to new action items, news, and other information about reopening that we don’t send out through our regular email list. | Fill out our Lockdown Survey about how the lockdowns are affecting you. In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin PS: Just a quick note that Created Equal: Clarence Thomas in His Own Words , a new film tracing the life story of Associate Justice of the Supreme Court, will be airing on PBS tonight at at 9:00 p.m. ET. In this documentary, Justice Thomas tells his entire life’s story, looking directly at the camera, speaking frankly to the audience. You don’t want to miss it! | Tea Party Patriots Action operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Michelle is running to lift up the voices of Kansans -- not corporate special interests. That's why she's refusing to accept a dime of corporate PAC money, so Kansans know she's fighting for them and no one else.

But that means if we're going to have the resources it takes to send her to Congress to advocate for us, then we need grassroots supporters to step up right away.

**[Will you stand with End Citizens United, and show Michelle you have her back, by chipping in $10 or more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17536055/197786080/-485776246?gpsid=8_122_12990&refcode=em20_200518_ECU_fnd_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200518_ECU_fnd_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWU2MTlkNi0yNDk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PJ7BLRGI9TwSL9cZJt0E5689IljYVxQlgrqWtULP4Ok=)**

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Did you hear the news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ)
---
Dear Peter,
I am Sandy Smith, a business executive, military mom and wife, and the new Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

_I am going to defeat Nancy Pelosi’s swampy Deputy whip, G.K. Butterfield, in this new district - but [I need your help urgently to do it!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ)_

_Did you hear about the news out of California this week?_

Republicans flipped a Democrat-held seat in California for the first time in 22 years. This was the swing seat in northern LA County, formerly held by Democrat Katie "Throuple" Hill- and is now held by a pro-Trump Republican! _He swung the district 20 points more Republican, compared to 2018._

_If the Republicans can make a comeback in LA, they can come back in rural North Carolina!_

**My district is a swing district- but it didn't used to be.**

Last year, the courts took a bunch of Republican voters out of other districts and put them in this one. It went from a safe Dem district that included the city of Durham, to a swing district with LOTS of Republicans like me, who don’t like being represented by a Socialist Democrat!

_There's a reason this matters so much this year._

With so many battleground districts this year, in key states for the President, we can't afford to cede anything to Nancy Pelosi. She fought in lots of Republican districts in 2018- and she will again.

**If we want to rip the Speaker's gavel out of her grubby hands for good, we MUST fight in swing districts like mine**. This is a brand new district where half the voters are Republicans who have never been represented by the obnoxious Democrat incumbent before.

That's why I'm fighting. North Carolina is suffering under a Democrat governor. _**We need a fighter. President Trump needs fighters in Congress- and that's where I come in!**_

[_I will fight and beat the Democrats in November- with your help._](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ)

_There are many people coming on board with my campaign_. I have already been endorsed by Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows.

Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. _**He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored!**_

I am also honored to have been endorsed by the National Association of Gun Rights and Americans for Legal Immigration PAC. They recognize me as being a staunch defender of our Second Amendment rights and opposing open borders!

[Will you help me beat Butterfield and send a fighter for President Trump to D.C.? I need to raise $9,700 before the end of the month so that I can meet my goal.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ) Will you help?

You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver!

I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!

[Can you help me take this swing district back, with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ) Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $60 or match or double match what you did before?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ) I need your [important contribution](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hdXIqYggQpNxmng&b=HzHStjuep.GioQ2CHClvEQ) by the end of this month. Thank you - Sandy

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

She fought in lots of Republican districts in 2018- and she will again. If we want to rip the Speaker's gavel out of her grubby hands for good, we MUST fight in swing districts like mine. This is a brand new district where half the voters are Republicans who have never been represented by the obnoxious Democrat incumbent before. That's why I'm fighting. North Carolina is suffering under a Democrat governor. We need a fighter. President Trump needs fighters in Congress- and that's where I come in! There are many people coming on board with my campaign. I have already been endorsed by Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows. Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored! I am also honored to have been endorsed by the National Association of Gun Rights and Americans for Legal Immigration PAC. They recognize me as being a staunch defender of our Second Amendment rights and opposing open borders! Will you help? You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver! I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand! Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you. For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need your by the end of this month. Thank you - Sandy PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC P.O. Box 434 Winterville NC 28590 USA |

One of Eugene’s first initiatives as PA’s Auditor General was to audit the Bureau of Dog Law Enforcement -- the agency charged with ensuring dogs are being kept in safe and humane conditions.

What he found was not good, team: An _intentional_ lack of enforcement of Pennsylvania’s dog law and financial mismanagement of the program. Eugene made 18 recommendations on how to strengthen the agency and correct the issues plaguing the bureau.

**Team, it’s this type of tenacity and leadership that Eugene will take with him to Congress.**

body:

Thousands of families are experiencing the worst pain and loss imaginable.
The entire global population is going through a radical disruption of daily life.
Jobs lost. Businesses folded. Futures turned upside down.
China. Is. To. Blame.
But the truth is, not everyone wants to admit that.
Not everyone is as willing to point out the damage done by this communist regime.

body:
With Democrats putting up record fundraising numbers across the nation, there's no time to sit back and relax. We must act now. We're looking for 20 patriots to step up tonight and pledge their support for the GOP Senate Majority before our extended mid-month deadline.
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs **YOU** to help him in this fight. _

disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3ff/2867296121/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | MJ for Texas

**One-Day Goal:** _732 Donations_
**Donors Needed From Your Area:** _11_
**Deadline:** _11:59 pm_ **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3fe/2867296121/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200518.1nd__1425__&amount=10")**
---
Peter -- it's now or never.

After nearly two decades in Washington, Senator John Cornyn has a nearly $13 million war chest that's heavily funded by corporate PACs. Texans are hungry for change, but MJ needs your help to defeat Senator Cornyn and his big-money backers in November.

To stay on track, **[we need to bring in 732 donors today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3fe/2867296121/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200518.1nd__1425__&amount=10")** And to make sure we do, we've set up a plan to get there town by town, city by city.

Yesterday, 4 people donated from your area. If we can bring in 11 more donations from your area today, we'll be on track to meet our goal. **[Will you be one of the 11 donors we need?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3fe/2867296121/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200518.1nd__1425__&amount=10")**

There's a reason a Koch-backed PAC is spending SEVEN figures in Texas. They know that if we win Texas, then we flip the Senate -- and they're desperate to stop that from happening so they can keep Mitch McConnell in power. But we can only do it with your help.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3fd/2867296121/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200518.1nd__1425__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3fc/2867296121/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200518.1nd__1425__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3f3/2867296121/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200518.1nd__1425__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890073/7f51f7bc/4e5b2f00/4ef6b3f2/2867296121/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200518.1nd__1425__&amount=50")**

subject: Biden SPIED on Michael Flynn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Kulkarni must answer if he has ever done the same | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/49ebffb11d75/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12455582?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Monday, May 18, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall Slams Joe Biden And Deep State Obama Administration Officials For Political Unmasking

Wall Also Praises Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) And Demands Sri Kulkarni Condemn Biden's Actions, Answer If He Has Ever Participated In Political Unmasking As A "Diplomat"**

_Sugar Land Republican Slams Deep State Democrats Joe Biden, James Comey, James Clapper, John Brennan And Samantha Power For Spying On Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, Incoming Trump Administration During Transition Period_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today slammed former Vice President Joe Biden and other Obama Administration officials for unmasking – a polite term for “spying on” – Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, President Donald J. Trump’s former National Security Advisor.

Weighing in on the explosive story proving President Trump to be right all along, Wall also praised the efforts of Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY), who has endorsed her campaign, for his vigilant efforts in requesting the names of those involved in Lt. Gen. Flynn’s unmasking, and Wall slammed Congressional Democratic nominee Sri Kulkarni for his unwillingness to condemn Joe Biden’s actions.

Elevating her criticism even further, Wall demanded Kulkarni answer if he has ever participated in political unmasking during his career as a self-proclaimed “diplomat.”

“Government spying and illegally listening in on political rivals used to be something from the movies, but now we’re finding out it’s something from the Obama-Biden Administration,” said Wall. “Sri Kulkarni must immediately condemn Joe Biden’s actions, as well as those of his fellow ‘diplomat,’ Samantha Power, and Kulkarni must answer if he has ever participated in political unmasking himself.”

As tweeted out by CBS News’ Catherine Herridge yesterday, “#FLYNN unmasking docs include these key details: ‘Each individual was an authorized recipient of the original report and the unmasking was approved through NSA’s standard process. While the principals are identified below, we cannot confirm they saw the unmasked information.”

“I am so thankful we have elected leaders like Sen. Rand Paul who have fought tirelessly to expose the fraud and political corruption of the Obama-Biden Administration, and I cannot wait to join Sen. Paul as an ally in the fight to reform FISA abuse in Washington,” continued Wall.

###
---

name: Susan Collins
subject: We must respond to the lies.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Chuck Schumer is at it again. He just placed another six figure ad buy to spread lies about me across the airwaves in Maine. The attacks from Chuck Schumer and the Far Left are so intense and frequent that my Urgent Response Fund has nearly run out. Right now, we don't have the necessary funds to fight back and set the record straight. That is why I am reaching out to you today. I need your help.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MjMyNjES1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTY5OTgwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
Chuck Schumer is at it again. He just placed another **six figure** ad buy to spread lies about me across the airwaves in Maine.
The attacks from Chuck Schumer and the Far Left are so intense and frequent that my Urgent Response Fund has nearly run out. Right now, we don't have the necessary funds to fight back and set the record straight. That is why I am reaching out to you today. _I need your help._
In order to fight back against these new attacks, I need to activate **97 new donors** for my Urgent Response Fund before **midnight tonight.** My campaign has limited time to fight back, so it is absolutely critical that we get 97 new donors by midnight.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MjMyNjES1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTY5OTgwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

---
[Donate any amount](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MjMyNjES1&kn=21&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTY5OTgwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

From here until election day, the Far Left will only invest more money into these false attacks. They will do everything in their power to unseat me in November, no matter the cost. [**Please join me in this fight and become a critical donor to my reelection campaign before midnight tonight!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MjMyNjES1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTY5OTgwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Susan Collins

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Our focus has to be JOBS, JOBS, JOBS
body:
Kendra Horn is part of Pelosi's job-killing agenda | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8b8492aad61b/calling-all-patriots-12443250?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=47c3e01cbd&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter, As we begin the long road to recovery from the COVID-19 economic disaster, **we must do whatever is necessary to support businesses and workers forced to shut down because of the Coronavirus.**

President Trump is hard at work bringing jobs back to the American people.

**But to do that, he needs pro-business allies in Congress.**

I spent 24 years running a small business with my dental practice, and over 40 years in the oil and gas industry. **It was regular, everyday people like me who elected Donald Trump as President** because he knows that jobs are what power our economy.

Yet, you have liberal Democrats like Kendra Horn who side with Nancy Pelosi's radical job-killing agenda day-in and day-out in Washington... Fighting against everything that we've worked so hard to build.

Well, there's a reason that **Roll Call has rated Kendra Horn as the most vulnerable incumbent** in the House of Representatives.

There's also a reason that **National Journal has rated OK-5 as the #1 take-back district in the country** this year.

It's because **Kendra Horn is not interested in creating jobs.** She constantly votes in favor of stifling economic growth with the rest of the tax-and-spend liberal elites in D.C.

Again, we have to do **whatever is necessary** to support businesses and workers forced to shut down.

**Oklahoma deserves a Congresswoman that will fight for economic growth.**

[**Will you chip in and help us send a pro-business ally to President Trump in Washington?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f0c37fb854&e=795c6d9796)
---

---

---
| Kendra Horn has shown us time and time again that she's not interested in jobs for hard-working Oklahomans. Her loyalty is to Pelosi and her radical job-killing agenda.

Let's send a true conservative fighter to Washington D.C.

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3e14e4204d&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

name: MEDIA ALERT
subject: We need a strong show of force
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Did you hear the news? Cory Gardner went live with his first TV campaign ad on Friday! See inside to watch it and learn more about Cory's work to provide essential aid to Coloradans and what he's doing to ensure that our communities are healthy and safe.

_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---

Did you hear the news? Cory Gardner went live with his first TV campaign ad on Friday! clean_body: Did you hear the news? Cory Gardner went live with his first TV campaign ad on Friday! See inside to watch it and learn more about Cory's work to provide essential aid to Coloradans and what he's doing to ensure that our communities are healthy and safe. Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating. And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue. Friend, Did you hear the news? Cory Gardner went live with his first TV campaign ad on Friday! Watch it == to learn more about Cory's work to provide essential aid to Coloradans and what he's doing to ensure that our communities are healthy and safe. As you can see in the ad, Cory is working with both Senate Republicans and Democrats, reaching across the aisle to provide a strong response that will help Coloradans and everyday Americans. Bold efforts like these show just how critical it is that leaders like Cory remain in Washington to fight for us. We need your help, Friend, to keep our first TV ad running and ensure that as many Coloradans hear Cory's uplifting message. == == == == == == While Cory is fighting for Coloradans and working to keep America's economy afloat, his opponents - including failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper - have focused their energy on attacking Cory's proven record. Bottom line: we need to champion common-sense leadership for Coloradans. So please, don't hesitate to get involved in our fight and help Cory keep this ad running and defend his principled leadership and proven record against the far-Left's misleading attacks in the media: == Thank you for your gracious and continued support. == PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE | | Cory Gardner for Senate | 9227 E LINCOLN AVE #200-234, Lone Tree, CO 80124 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

Tonight, four far-Left candidates fighting to flip Iowa's Senate seat blue will take the stage in Johnston where they'll compete for the title of Iowa's Top Socialist.
If Chuck Schumer flips this Senate seat in November, we risk Democrats imposing the Green New Deal, Medicare-for-All, open borders, and many more socialists policies on our very way of life here in Iowa.

name: Karen Jones
subject: Celebrate Mondaire’s birthday with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
This is Karen, Mondaire’s mom. It’s been a while since I checked in. The last time was in late September. The world, and this campaign, were very different then. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.31v/avNi0GDnTgKgx35BcaWazw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKh7DafwI7cfpZPprHE92vWo-2BQUBv-2F-2BKiXx19NufzkqIlOhnnK2MEyGp3HkAhdbG8MiyLfyY4gZBu-2BV4XudNl45aJ8-2BwXh6WHIjdtycnFu0nrbHEnoGqC2qmXzNaotk3r7WNjf5DIX7ozpZkMkgVFlWJvl-2Bh-2BJ-2FixVM4tR2AEkjjTp0c6GGw-2FNPR53St8H7KhuUZoD-2FW87uQ5TWVdjZuEc5bD3JfwdjuZJVA-2BbNjT1bqDk10iQJa4EhSqzOf8-2FdtnzyZ51Ur50yYU75xz6NPWmtZ72CDtL3hxKGlLPsbAIf431rYUXXC6dnw-2Bs0u5TLHPk-3D/buhy) Hi Friend, **** **** **** This is Karen, Mondaire’s mom. It’s been a while since I checked in. The last time was in late September. The world, and this campaign, were very different then. But one thing has remained constant: Mondaire is running a _very_ strong race.
On my son’s 33rd birthday, I want to share with you how proud I am of all the things my baby has accomplished since September. Mondaire was endorsed by U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren, has raised just shy of a million dollars, and has built a campaign from the ground up with thousands of supporters and hundreds of volunteers on his side.
Raising Mondaire in the Village of Spring Valley wasn’t easy. I had to work multiple jobs just for us to be able to survive, and costs were so high that we still needed Section 8 housing and food stamps. Still, I taught my son to _dream big and fight hard_.
Mondaire worked incredibly hard to make it to Stanford University, serve his country under President Obama, and attend Harvard Law School. I always knew he would do amazing things. But the fact is, Mondaire should not be the exception. Too many kids growing up in places like Spring Valley won’t have the same trajectory, and it won’t be for lack of potential or effort.
_My son is running to change that_. Every kid should be able to dream big and achieve those dreams.

No matter the room, or how rarefied the air, Mondaire has never forgotten where he came from. I can’t tell you how proud I am to see him run for Congress -- to represent the community that raised him -- and defy people’s expectations at every stage of this race. Today, he turns 33, and over the next five weeks, tens of thousands of voters will cast their ballots for NY-17’s next Representative. I know Mondaire will best represent this district, but I need every Democratic voter to know it too.
By June 23rd, every Democratic voter must know that Mondaire will fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, student debt forgiveness, and a $15 minimum wage when he’s elected to Congress.
But I need your help getting him there. His birthday is the perfect time to celebrate all that he’s accomplished throughout this campaign. **_[Will you celebrate with me by making a donation to his campaign today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.31v/avNi0GDnTgKgx35BcaWazw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKh7DafwI7cfpZPprHE92vWo-2BQUBv-2F-2BKiXx19NufzkqIolmys-2FM7PlFVGdiYx-2B-2FkUO1J6sh9Dueac8Ofd8SIjj64ckgx5xn5y3FPeiwxUg3S88qtCIUkDFPfKcjeVP-2FwljTwrzY68E1x5H3kPN-2F021E2opF0nlqWFfuF-2Bm-2BjQzcb5lXpHbBlLqMD-2BXHGvHj4DLHkHh3I2M6-2FGPeQ2YES93VjVdUnAVo9ctjQ3OtG4bKHNdUG2W1kqsWYjimoU1m0na7Kz1tsTHRjHNmVxdPQtzP5rLBd4t270uoKItJ01hOxuHXrXzI6QqBznXIZ1FiR1w-3D/OL2v)_**

clean_body: This is Karen, Mondaire’s mom. It’s been a while since I checked in. The last time was in late September. The world, and this campaign, were very different then. | | | Hi Friend, ** This is Karen, Mondaire’s mom. It’s been a while since I checked in. The last time was in late September. The world, and this campaign, were very different then. But one thing has remained constant: Mondaire is running a very strong race. On my son’s 33rd birthday, I want to share with you how proud I am of all the things my baby has accomplished since September. Mondaire was endorsed by U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren, has raised just shy of a million dollars, and has built a campaign from the ground up with thousands of supporters and hundreds of volunteers on his side. Raising Mondaire in the Village of Spring Valley wasn’t easy. I had to work multiple jobs just for us to be able to survive, and costs were so high that we still needed Section 8 housing and food stamps. Still, I taught my son to dream big and fight hard. Mondaire worked incredibly hard to make it to Stanford University, serve his country under President Obama, and attend Harvard Law School. I always knew he would do amazing things. But the fact is, Mondaire should not be the exception. Too many kids growing up in places like Spring Valley won’t have the same trajectory, and it won’t be for lack of potential or effort. My son is running to change that. Every kid should be able to dream big and achieve those dreams. No matter the room, or how rarefied the air, Mondaire has never forgotten where he came from. I can’t tell you how proud I am to see him run for Congress -- to represent the community that raised him -- and defy people’s expectations at every stage of this race. Today, he turns 33, and over the next five weeks, tens of thousands of voters will cast their ballots for NY-17’s next Representative. I know Mondaire will best represent this district, but I need every Democratic voter to know it too. By June 23rd, every Democratic voter must know that Mondaire will fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, student debt forgiveness, and a $15 minimum wage when he’s elected to Congress. But I need your help getting him there. His birthday is the perfect time to celebrate all that he’s accomplished throughout this campaign. ** Thank you so much for all of your support for Mondaire. With your help, next year he’ll be celebrating his birthday as a member of Congress. Sincerely, Karen Jones | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

# WATCH: Vice President Joe Biden Speaks to City Leaders
[](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=ab0a541a1ecc4db69fcd74247fc2e166&_e=MOfIg0FUbKxSmF23e7TbCSUxa_jm-3wr1KYZbNURA9fjHBz9VAf0ajHx4nXLNGsQTdhIF305dGgiOAEUJqGwnQU1utb-zXDkgNraRMjumNGSZ0xUhflubKmqVMhf0ALewTo5MJ255aBAHdOMLLQp2p1cNvIpIqwKBZZI0__stvFDBNAUG1JXngRXR4xYJy2QBu3-LOjD-IQryvyxbROeLQ70PN0xVujIdWL2dtVAZDoU5b3zY0dIudv6PNFXp5zwfDpWn77_-0Mtv7c_4OA8cg%3D%3D)
**[https://youtu.be/13EfD0Iz42k](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=ab0a541a1ecc4db69fcd74247fc2e166&_e=MOfIg0FUbKxSmF23e7TbCSUxa_jm-3wr1KYZbNURA9fjHBz9VAf0ajHx4nXLNGsQC3iRxS8KRhE78NISPoNYsYgp7cOrcfn-kDSB0M0Y-wkM4f_W9EIFslyzjCfbS9PfHnufidr4KpMp9w5vgW1H0uSEs_vnGKimFrpTWrrGmW7WbfumCpjAObzrTAXAk8pkZLZV41FGYUiP4vVv4XvZE-O9_5FmOD4gbSUoWVFyEkivnB6UwugvApCzQ6DBoi7xH4ffv0codkTmXjDfchaGOQ%3D%3D)** Friend, Cities and towns, not the White House, are taking the lead in the fight to protect Americans from COVID-19. That's why Mike has been bringing together mayors and local leaders for virtual convenings each week, to connect with experts and share public health and economic solutions. Our most recent virtual convening was joined by Vice President Joe Biden, who shared a message of hope for the days ahead: [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=ab0a541a1ecc4db69fcd74247fc2e166&_e=MOfIg0FUbKxSmF23e7TbCWcwK3uGD4CeaFcBz4pp9_PWoR6kvI-IoUailGWD1DaqjvR3qzEg1PPz_MqYe9LxHXPnrB9m2hFv_QaUE4NeuskW_WkE9wggqj_-uAQzQU18fNyG74VD6HYkbGzi9J4Ed4sfrvYZktLT5LQGbqBR0jNdkCkkc4d6CkTz_N8DvuyTWQg1uGNdK8PKiW-dT-Xpop1ky4H19PxQYHCMgTr_Y33JrT3oU9C9cbzJxe02NAB5CTgMsPk5EOg_w__XRTaFwnHE4yD69SdnBUinrRwP5YD7QRXN2SSVtlHyCcdnsZTkhPCFiRo4zCJpR2zIrMOs-Kg92KEowqs4UNzaWbcPlFxmxG99Nmm3ho6V8RDZfwZg)

We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you! WATCH: Vice President Joe Biden Speaks to City Leaders Friend, Cities and towns, not the White House, are taking the lead in the fight to protect Americans from COVID-19. That's why Mike has been bringing together mayors and local leaders for virtual convenings each week, to connect with experts and share public health and economic solutions. Our most recent virtual convening was joined by Vice President Joe Biden, who shared a message of hope for the days ahead: Share the Vice President's message of hope | | | ---|---|--- The Vice President also commended the leadership happening at the local level -- where the fates of people and communities aren't determined by partisan politics: Share the Vice President's message on local leadership | | ---|---|--- Right now, we need leadership that will respond to this crisis by relying on facts, broad-scale action, and compassion. We hope you will watch Vice President Biden's remarks and share his messages on the path forward with your networks. Thanks, Bloomberg Philanthropies | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- . name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Team Obama’s Unmasking Dodge
body:
"The media are mostly ignoring the news that 39 Obama officials sought to read the transcripts of Michael Flynn’s conversations with foreigners." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d852cc0224&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Team Obama****’****s Unmasking Dodge**

“The media are mostly ignoring the news that 39 Obama officials sought to read the transcripts of Michael Flynn’s conversations with foreigners, but here and there they’ve asked a question. The unpersuasive answers suggest there’s more to learn,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

The left’s assumption seems to be that “it’s OK to eavesdrop on your political opponents if you’re curious about their conversations with foreigners. We doubt that justification would have played well had the George W. Bush Administration spied on Barack Obama’s incoming team.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad5a52e2bf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue visited a Maryland food wholesaler on Friday to launch a $3 billion “Farmers to Families Food Box” program. This effort, part of President Trump’s $2.2 trillion Coronavirus relief package, ensures that certain distributors allocate food from small farms to nonprofits and faith-based groups, Audrey Conklin reports for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a0b2c6129f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Let’s be clear: A crime was committed in the Michael Flynn case. But that crime was committed not by the retired general, but by someone who leaked the classified details of his conversations with then-Russian Ambassador Sergey Kislyak,” American Enterprise Institute Resident Fellow Marc Thiessen writes in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc1a7fdd41&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “This year, as the deadly COVID-19 pandemic continues to sweep through our country, Police Week went virtual in order to mitigate the risk of further spread. The fact that we couldn’t be together physically was an important reminder for Americans to pay thanks to the men and women who wear the uniform each day, risking their own health and safety to protect our communities,” Acting DHS Secretary Chad Wolf writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1cef267ed3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b052b06023&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d02cf1b01f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d1f914f346)
---

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Moving forward, together
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y77VVrZtbpxSKjM-YnQXX1ltQ1wREkoY6gtl8D4Q2g8=/dxe9lPDMgGuFrAypy-9sy9OySogciE57GP-frUFzQGk=?refcode=051820)
| | Friend, Last night we closed the book on the 91st legislative session -- my first as Speaker of the House.
We accomplished a lot this year. We came together, DFLers and Republicans, to pass significant investments in COVID-19 response and relief. We worked together to finally tackle the insulin affordability crisis, enacting the Alec Smith Insulin Affordability Act. We passed the Prescription Drug Transparency Act to bring down the cost of prescription drugs. We put significant differences aside to pass important legislation to keep our elections safe and secure. We successfully worked to provide additional help to our farmers, ban the toxic chemical TCE, and raise the age to purchase tobacco to 21.
While some bipartisan progress was made, Republicans blocked many other DFL measures to safeguard Minnesotans' health and economic well-being. That's exactly why we need to hold the House and flip the Senate this fall.
The Minnesota House DFL has always, and will always, fight for ALL Minnesotans including the most vulnerable--those with pre-existing conditions, who are high-risk, and who are struggling economically. That hasn't changed during this pandemic. We will keep working to help Minnesotans weather the pandemic and thrive when it's over.
We will continue working for a better future for all Minnesotans.
Thank you,
Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y77VVrZtbpxSKjM-YnQXX1ltQ1wREkoY6gtl8D4Q2g8=/dxe9lPDMgGuFrAypy-9sy9OySogciE57GP-frUFzQGk=?refcode=051820)

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Save the United States Postal Service >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc416/2a380d31/23d273c5/f09bb4/3370193925/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc416/2a380d31/23d273c5/f09bb4/3370193925/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there --
The United States Postal Service could run out of money in just a few months if Donald Trump refuses to authorize emergency relief. If that happens, our country's postal system could collapse.
A crumbling postal service could mean job losses and wage cuts for postal workers across from coast to coast, reduced services to rural areas, and a dramatic impact on our elections as COVID-19 pushes us toward vote by mail.
[**We need 5,000 signatures to tell Donald Trump to protect the USPS and save thousands of essential workers ' jobs. Please add your name right away.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc416/2a380d31/23d273c5/f09bb5/3370193925/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2020_saveusps%3Frefcode%3De20200518_uspsja")
Letter carriers and postal workers are on the front lines, putting themselves at risk to keep us connected, supplied, and safe. It's absolutely critical that we keep the USPS and all of its workers functioning smoothly and safely through this crisis and through the November election.
[**Please sign the petition calling on the Trump administration to fund the U.S. Postal Service and to stop using this essential service as a political bargaining chip.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc416/2a380d31/23d273c5/f09bb5/3370193925/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2020_saveusps%3Frefcode%3De20200518_uspsja")
Thank you,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc416/2a380d31/23d273c5/f09bb6/3370193925/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDUxOF9zYXZldXNwczEtamFfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200518_saveusps1-ja_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc416/2a380d31/23d273c5/f09bb7/3370193925/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
