name: Rita Hart
subject: Thank you for sticking by my side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/bcblp7cFM8zJ7abTwZvVYh0jqt3sLRWKJFUN8OrYF90=/Fvft2Uy9oJ5SqMMfp1vakRe6gBplif7KgSUw6CbiKVE=)._
* * *
Thank you for sticking by my side this past year since I launched my campaign for IA-02. It certainly has been an unpredictable year, but I know that if we work hard enough, we will pull off a huge Democratic victory here in IA-02. We've seen a lot of success this past year, but I know that after the primary the positive tenor of this race may well be challenged, and we need to be prepared to take on that battle. **[Will you help me continue to listen to every single voice in the district by making a $20 donation today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bcblp7cFM8zJ7abTwZvVYh0jqt3sLRWKJFUN8OrYF90=/nVmT4UPdjPAVJcrbsC_6KK1KO_MgwFHzdkEn7HmG9GQ=?refcode=200518-email&amount=20)** I need you in the long run of this race because this is one of the most competitive races in the country. Donald Trump won our Iowa district in 2016, so we're going to have to fight hard for a victory. This race continues to be my greatest project -- I am committed to the success of this district, worked as a teacher, farmer and State Senator here. Now, I want to take my loyalty to this community to the next step. **[Will you help me keep going strong by making a donation today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bcblp7cFM8zJ7abTwZvVYh0jqt3sLRWKJFUN8OrYF90=/nVmT4UPdjPAVJcrbsC_6KK1KO_MgwFHzdkEn7HmG9GQ=?refcode=200518-email)** Thank you for your support, Rita Hart [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bcblp7cFM8zJ7abTwZvVYh0jqt3sLRWKJFUN8OrYF90=/XBlnG0Kdd6k_S2BMif6QQm6gRnDHiBgbZsGuRmWVops=?refcode=200518-email) | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/bcblp7cFM8zJ7abTwZvVYh0jqt3sLRWKJFUN8OrYF90=/HrbNa2S1StKvc9BTZD2wr0UenrbEYanw80_MyYm1Ch8=).

****** ******

name: MUST-READ@protectvoting.org
subject: Does Pennsylvania need a Post Office? (please open!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4d7/2074000482/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1")

| | The post office in is collapsing in front of our very eyes, Peter **The post office in 18326 is collapsing in front of our very eyes, Peter -- and our democracy is on the line.** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4d6/2074000482/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1") Primary elections across this country are currently running via vote-by-mail -- and as Democrats push to make November's election vote-by-mail they're running into a _Republican roadblock_. **The GOP is DISMANTLING the post office and UNDERMINING vote-by-mail in a DESPERATE effort to save President Trump and their Senate majority.** The USPS is "a literal lifeline" for American elections at this moment. **So, we 're taking a stand by asking 10,000 of our digital supporters to sign a petition to Save the Post Office. [Can we count on you to be one of those signatures?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4d9/2074000482/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+be+one+of+those+s&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4d8/2074000482/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1") _We need 250 signatures from Pennsylvania!_ Post offices aren't being attacked because of "mail delivery" \-- but because during the pandemic they've become the backbone of American democracy. **That 's why President Trump and his Republican party have spent the last few months destroying the foundation of the post office:**
* The President called the post office "a joke".
* Trump said he would VETO any coronavirus bill with funding for the post office.
* The new Postmaster General is a loyal Trump donor and crony.
* The RNC has $20 million to fight lawsuits on vote-by-mail.

_Peter Republicans are throwing everything they 've got at the Post Office in hopes it will crumble quietly._ They've got a new thing coming -- our grassroots digital supporters are fighting back! [**We 're hoping we can count on you to help us by being one of our 10,000 signatures! Will you sign our petition today?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4db/2074000482/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Wersquore+hoping+we+can+count+on+you+to+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1") | | | [Sign on to Save the Post Office NOW! >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4da/2074000482/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Sign+on+to+Save+the+Post+Office+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1")
---
_We need 250 signatures from Pennsylvania!_
Thanks for your swift action!
_\-- the Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4dd/2074000482/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1")
---
| | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d048c/72412298/4cfb8eac/6104b4df/2074000482/VEsP/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://voterprotect.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200518_PostAttackRe_U3_X1")

body:
...............................................................
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540096/197876820/182442090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=&emci=ede180e6-4199-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=08cbd1d7-4999-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540097/197876821/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=&emci=ede180e6-4199-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=08cbd1d7-4999-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
Hi Friend,

We hate to give attention to crazy political antics and grandstanding, but the new lows reached by Sri’s Republican opponents cannot go ignored.

Kathaleen Wall and Troy Nehls, Sri’s opponents, are locked in a battle to out-extreme one another in the TX-22 Republican runoff.

**While national gun groups dump money into our district in an attempt to prop up Wall as the most pro-gun candidate,_Nehls has taken to Facebook in a bizarre rant touting his support for firearms in places of worship._**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540098/197876822/182442090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=&emci=ede180e6-4199-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=08cbd1d7-4999-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524) | [Sign: Keep extremism out of TX-22 ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540099/197876823/182442090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=&emci=ede180e6-4199-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=08cbd1d7-4999-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)
---
Our families are facing real issues, and we deserve a candidate who takes this job seriously. Wall and Nehls have both shown that they’re more concerned about proving their extremist credentials than they are about finding common-sense solutions to the challenges our state is facing.

Wall and Nehls have nothing to offer Texans but special interests talking points and embarrassing social media accounts. Sri believes our state has a unique opportunity to lead the country as a pioneer in responsible gun safety measures (it’s why he’s earned the support of former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, Brady PAC, and Moms Demand Action!), health care reforms that work for all families, and economic growth.

Sri is running to represent this district because he believes we can’t take another year of political stunts and outrageous rhetoric. We need public servants who are ready to get to work and unite our divided country.

[**If you’re tired of the same old political nonsense and ready for a change to true leadership, sign our petition to say no to far-right extremism and yes to Sri for Congress! >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540100/197876824/182442090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=&emci=ede180e6-4199-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=08cbd1d7-4999-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)
[SIGN NOW ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540101/197876825/182442090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=&emci=ede180e6-4199-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=08cbd1d7-4999-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)
---
-Team Sri

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540102/197876826/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.18_U_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540103/197876827/1700156400?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.18_U_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=)
---
* * *
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at [sri2020.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540104/197876828/307941387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNiZDFkNy00OTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VhuyN6yQIM_jxiTMPAOraEYIEkieZlhjLBn9TuqTUDI=&emci=ede180e6-4199-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=08cbd1d7-4999-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524)
| Paid for by Sri for Congress

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: What was he thinking?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends- Can you believe this? On Friday, Max Rose followed the instructions of Speaker Nancy Pelosi and joined Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Jerry Nadler, Ilhan Ohmar and Adam Schiff to vote for a $3 trillion dollar far left wishlist.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=158A210A1A2644)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

Can you believe this?

On Friday, Max Rose followed the instructions of Speaker Nancy Pelosi and joined Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Jerry Nadler, Ilhan Ohmar and Adam Schiff to vote for a $3 trillion dollar far left wishlist.

[Watch Nicole beak down the Heroes Act and Chip in $5 to help us defeat Max Rose:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=158A210A1A2645)

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=158A210A1A2645)
---
| | |
---
| | Their HEROES Act:

❌ Releases convicts over the age of 50 including murderers and rapists

❌ Gives stimulus checks to illegal immigrants while 36 million Americans are unemployed

❌ Makes drastic changes to how we vote, compromising the integrity of our elections

❌ Prohibits states from requiring voter ID

❌ Makes mail-in voting permanent

❌ Allows same day voter registration without proper vetting

---
| | |
---
| | [ HELP DEFEAT MAX ROSE ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=158A210A1A2646)
---
| | |

| | In a time when Washington should be united and work swiftly to help unemployed Americans and struggling small businesses, Max Rose voted for a partisan package with these poison pills.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani Update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/697b1f9bb91a/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Hello, amazing Dani for Illinois volunteers!

>From all of us here at #TeamDani, I hope you had a great weekend and are staying healthy. If you are in need of any community resources or support during this crisis, do not hesitate to reach out.

As always, thank you all SO MUCH for your incredible work this week and for your support of the campaign. As we do every week, check out some highlights and reminders below
* You were able to reach out to over 3,785 voters in the 16th on the phone this week! That is a STAGGERING number of phone calls, y’all!
* HUGE shoutout to Michelle P for taking on over 220 of those calls all on her own!
* We have sent out another 300 postcards to volunteer writers all throughout the District to engage voters and, of course, #SaveUSPS!
* We held a fantastic Facebook Live Town Hall on Tuesday, thank you all for your great questions and participation!

**A few reminders:**

* If you are interested in hosting a Virtual House Party for Dani, reach out to Marguerite at [marguerite@daniforillinois.com](mailto:marguerite@daniforillinois.com). We will walk you through it, we just need you to invite your friends and pour yourself your happy hour drink of choice!
* We have updated our [Talking Points document](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0690bc1290&e=140a9b81e7) to reflect a few additional issue areas and topics. PLEASE take a few minutes to look it over, and ask any questions before your next call shift.
* Everyone within the sound of my voice (or email, or Facebook, or text...) is an activist waiting to be engaged - that means that we all have activist friends. If anyone you know is starting to get itchy to make a difference, send them our way!

**Volunteer Voice!** _The guest columnist this week is... Beth J! _
1. _“I keep the DaniForIllinois website open to the “Issues” page on a separate tab to quickly refer to it if I get questions.”_
2. _“I make an extra effort to speak slowly and clearly. It's easy to talk fast and to mumble when you're saying the same thing over and over, but trust me, this helps!”_
Kathy Tall
Deputy Field Director

---

name: Tina Smith
subject: What you said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
I can't tell you how grateful I am that so many of you chipped in to help us reach our $50,000 fundraising goal. Your contributions make a huge difference for our campaign, especially as we adapt to this new reality. **Thank you for continuing to support us as we work to take back the Senate and stop Minnesota from flipping red. It means the world to me.** I’m also grateful for those of you who took the time to fill out the priorities survey I sent at the beginning of this month. It's so important to me that we set our agenda together, and that means getting input from as many folks as possible. I wanted to share some of the answers that will help shape our campaign: The top three issues folks checked off were making affordable **health care** accessible to everyone, protecting our environment from the effects of **climate change** , and preserving **Social Security and Medicare.** **Nine out of every ten** people said health care was their top issue — unchanged from our past surveys. I wanted to share what else really stood out in that last section, where I asked for any other major priority you have right now. Here are a few:
* Saving the United States Postal Service
* Strengthening rural hospitals
* Protecting and expanding the right to vote

Thanks again for being part of this team. I'm truly grateful for the passion, hard work, and determination everybody brings to this campaign. And hey, if you didn't get a chance to take the survey yet, I’m still reading new answers – **[you can click right here to send yours in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540632/197890255/25030096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjM2YjNmZi00ZTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sq-hqXRBjLuevJMZNh4kMe87C2gs6H0yRKubwdXhiFk=&emci=4a36b3ff-4e99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=4b36b3ff-4e99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17540633/197890256/25030096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjM2YjNmZi00ZTk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sq-hqXRBjLuevJMZNh4kMe87C2gs6H0yRKubwdXhiFk=&emci=4a36b3ff-4e99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=4b36b3ff-4e99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)
---
Take care and talk soon.
— Tina

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Adam Kinzinger voted against YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/24297a910515/adam-kinzinger-voted-against-you?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Adam Kinzinger just voted against a bill to help Americans who are struggling due to COVID-19, and nobody is surprised. **Adam has made a habit of voting against the interests of everyday Americans during his time in Congress.** From his 60+ votes to repeal the Affordable Care Act to his vote for the Trump tax cuts, Adam has shown his true colors over and over again. But here's some good news:**with your help, I can beat him.**
---
| [Donate here to help defeat Adam Kinzinger](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=61d1058c6f&e=140a9b81e7 "Donate here to help defeat Adam Kinzinger")
---
| I'll be honest with you, I have no idea how Adam Kinzinger can look at a crisis that has cost over 90,000 American lives and sent over 35 million Americans to the unemployment line, and decide to vote against the HEROES Act.

Voting against hazard pay for healthcare workers who are putting their lives at risk every day is despicable enough, but to add that to a vote against stimulus checks for Americans who are missing their rent and mortgage payments just makes it even worse.

**When it came time for Adam to vote for tax cuts for billionaires in 2017, he was happy to do so. When it came time for Adam to step up and vote to support the American people through this pandemic, he simply said "no."**

As I said, I have no idea what was running through his head when he voted this way.**But I can promise you that when I'm in Congress you can count on me to do everything I can to make sure Congress is looking out for the working families in this country.**[Can I count on you to help get me there with a donation today?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=caa65dfb11&e=140a9b81e7)

With your help, we'll remove Adam Kinzinger from Congress this November.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

clean_body: | | | | | | | Adam Kinzinger just voted against a bill to help Americans who are struggling due to COVID-19, and nobody is surprised. Adam has made a habit of voting against the interests of everyday Americans during his time in Congress. From his 60+ votes to repeal the Affordable Care Act to his vote for the Trump tax cuts, Adam has shown his true colors over and over again. But here's some good news:with your help, I can beat him. | "Donate here to help defeat Adam Kinzinger" | I'll be honest with you, I have no idea how Adam Kinzinger can look at a crisis that has cost over 90,000 American lives and sent over 35 million Americans to the unemployment line, and decide to vote against the HEROES Act. Voting against hazard pay for healthcare workers who are putting their lives at risk every day is despicable enough, but to add that to a vote against stimulus checks for Americans who are missing their rent and mortgage payments just makes it even worse. When it came time for Adam to vote for tax cuts for billionaires in 2017, he was happy to do so. When it came time for Adam to step up and vote to support the American people through this pandemic, he simply said "no." As I said, I have no idea what was running through his head when he voted this way.But I can promise you that when I'm in Congress you can count on me to do everything I can to make sure Congress is looking out for the working families in this country. With your help, we'll remove Adam Kinzinger from Congress this November. Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Donate here" | | | | | | | | | | | daniforillinois.com | | Paid for by Dani for Illinois | | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Sharice Davids
subject: Something’s happening in Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
In 2020, we have the opportunity to elect another strong woman leader: Barbara Bollier. She has the momentum to flip this seat -- and become the first woman doctor in the U.S. Senate.

|
---

| | Team, In 2018, we made history in Kansas. In 2020, we’re going to do it again. When I defeated an incumbent Republican in 2018 to represent Kansas’ third congressional district, I became one of the first Native American women to ever serve in Congress. We also beat the long odds and elected Democrat Laura Kelly as our new governor. In 2020, we have the opportunity to elect another strong woman leader: Barbara Bollier. She has the momentum to flip this seat -- and become the first woman doctor in the U.S. Senate. [**Team, we need to defend our progress in Kansas and keep making history in 2020. That’s why I’m asking you to show your support for my re-election and for Barbara’s campaign for Senate. Will you split a $5 contribution right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17541139/197899085/-838162127?refcode=em200517i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzYzNjAxYy01NDk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j89YIBkgRo7nzXmkFzePGVE06f06k9a5sQkq4KYgzNs=) Something big is happening in Kansas. Families here are ready for a change, because we’ve seen enough from politicians who put partisanship ahead of people. And enough is enough. We need more leaders in Washington who will put our families first. And we need more public servants who will fight for what matters to Kansans, like access to affordable healthcare. I’m so proud to take that fight to Congress every day, but I can’t do it alone. I need supporters like you to have my back -- and to join the effort to send more strong Kansas leaders to D.C. [**With your support, I know we aren’t done making history in Kansas -- but we need to win in the 3rd District and this pivotal Senate race. Split $5 now to join us in the fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17541140/197899086/-838162127?refcode=em200517i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzYzNjAxYy01NDk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j89YIBkgRo7nzXmkFzePGVE06f06k9a5sQkq4KYgzNs=) Thank you, Sharice Davids **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17541141/197899087/-838162127?refcode=em200517i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzYzNjAxYy01NDk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j89YIBkgRo7nzXmkFzePGVE06f06k9a5sQkq4KYgzNs=)**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Every week should be National Nurses Week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Betsy and Claire are heroes.
| **From the Desk of
Jay Inslee** Friend, Nurses across the country are putting their lives on the line every single day to care for us -- and I've thought of them every single day since this pandemic began. We recently celebrated National Nurses Week, and stories like the ones from Betsy and Claire below remind me of why we're fighting for fact-based, rational policies that put people first. They're risking their lives to keep us safe -- the least we can do is support them, and all our first responders and essential workers, by slowing the number of people infected every single day. Their stories are inspiring, and I hope you'll join me in thanking all of our nurses for their incredible focus, empathy, and skill. **Betsy Scott** is a nurse at Swedish Cancer Institute where she and her colleagues have continued to tend to patients fighting cancer amid the COVID-19 crisis. Betsy cares dearly for her patients, who are not only battling cancer, but must face the anxiety of their more vulnerable immune systems being exposed to COVID-19. A great deal of care must be taken to ensure that the cancer patients and health care workers are not exposed to the virus. Betsy has worked hard to make sure her patients receive the safest possible care every day. **Claire Johnson** is a nurse at Tacoma General Hospital who volunteered to work on the hospital's newly established COVID-19 floor when the coronavirus pandemic hit. Over the past month, Claire and her colleagues have taken on the labor-intensive work of caring for COVID-19 patients. Just as importantly, she has worked to bridge the divide between patients in isolation and family members who cannot be by their sides. The emotional support for patients and families is so important and has had a lasting impact not only on those families -- but on Claire as well. Nurses like Betsy and Claire, care coordinators, and doctors are more essential than ever as they work to provide greater care to protect themselves and their patients, who depend on them to get well during this difficult time. They are two of the thousands of nurses in Washington state and across the country risking it all on the front lines of this pandemic. Every week should be National Nurses Week -- if you or someone you love is a nurse, I speak for all of Washington when I extend my deepest gratitude. The work you're doing will be remembered as the heroic work of this incredibly challenging time, and you will be the heroes the history books remember. **Thank you.** Very truly yours, Jay
---

Their stories are inspiring, and I hope you'll join me in thanking all of our nurses for their incredible focus, empathy, and skill. Betsy Scott is a nurse at Swedish Cancer Institute where she and her colleagues have continued to tend to patients fighting cancer amid the COVID-19 crisis. Betsy cares dearly for her patients, who are not only battling cancer, but must face the anxiety of their more vulnerable immune systems being exposed to COVID-19. A great deal of care must be taken to ensure that the cancer patients and health care workers are not exposed to the virus. Betsy has worked hard to make sure her patients receive the safest possible care every day. Claire Johnson is a nurse at Tacoma General Hospital who volunteered to work on the hospital's newly established COVID-19 floor when the coronavirus pandemic hit. Over the past month, Claire and her colleagues have taken on the labor-intensive work of caring for COVID-19 patients. Just as importantly, she has worked to bridge the divide between patients in isolation and family members who cannot be by their sides. The emotional support for patients and families is so important and has had a lasting impact not only on those families -- but on Claire as well. Nurses like Betsy and Claire, care coordinators, and doctors are more essential than ever as they work to provide greater care to protect themselves and their patients, who depend on them to get well during this difficult time. They are two of the thousands of nurses in Washington state and across the country risking it all on the front lines of this pandemic. Every week should be National Nurses Week -- if you or someone you love is a nurse, I speak for all of Washington when I extend my deepest gratitude. The work you're doing will be remembered as the heroic work of this incredibly challenging time, and you will be the heroes the history books remember. Thank you. Very truly yours, Jay

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: We need just a little help
body:
In just two short weeks, Primary Day will be here. This election brought a lot of challenges, however, there's also things working to our advantage. The number of requested absentee ballots is nearing 60,000, which is already more than the total votes in any previous Republican primary. Because our team is quick and driven, we've been able to send letters to a majority of them. But we need to reach those who haven't yet voted.

We need help calling voters to turn the vote out. It's so easy to do. Ella, my 14-year-old daughter, can also attest that it's plenty of fun. If you or someone you know can make phone calls, we would appreciate the help! Ten people making 20 calls per day for 10 days will reach 2000 voters. This could make all the difference in THIS election. And who knows, you may find a long lost relative or friend on this endeavor. It's a small world!

Please feel free to reach out to myself or Brett Barbin, our campaign manager, at barbin@richardsforcongress.com or his cell number 712-600-4490. He can get you set up and started on a list.

With your help, we will win this election!

Bret Richards
(712) 579-4753

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b166/18e32a7f/4c31c684/7b21d322/2944024228/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b166/18e32a7f/4c31c684/7b21d323/2944024228/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b166/18e32a7f/4c31c684/7b21d320/2944024228/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b166/18e32a7f/4c31c684/7b21d32c/2944024228/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b166/18e32a7f/4c31c684/7b21d321/2944024228/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Don't miss these segments...
body:
Had some great guests on "Spicer&Co" last week

http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fd2b202d5da63%2Fdont-miss-these-segments&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193 Share (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fd2b202d5da63%2Fdont-miss-these-segments&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193)
http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Don%27t+miss+these+segments...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fd2b202d5da63%2Fdont-miss-these-segments Tweet (http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Don%27t+miss+these+segments...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2Fd2b202d5da63%2Fdont-miss-these-segments)
http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aa3f36de9c&e=f6564bbe3b Forward to Friend (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aa3f36de9c&e=f6564bbe3b)

** Don't Miss These Great Segments From Last Week on "Spicer&Co"
------------------------------------------------------------
Make sure you check out these great segments from last week on Spicer&Co.

We discussed the media, and the latest antics from the White House press corps with Emily Miller (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U85Feca4nBM&t=215s&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) , selective editing with Derek Hunter (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4XQ4fz53Ul8&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) and bias with Dave Rubin (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0T2kiiiDU2k&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) . We covered the dismissal of the case against General Flynn and what his case tells us about corruption within the DOJ with a member of the President's legal team Jay Sekulow (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=30aI2x_K9-c&t=4s&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) and Rep. Jim Jordan (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8D9Ad5DeVcM&t=7s&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) . We discussed re-opening post coronavirus and how we can support American businesses with Senator Rick Scott (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=klrDPC6RdGQ&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) , Rep. Denver Riggleman (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eOrPPMlqraw&t=4s&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) and a business owner (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FJU1TaGion8&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) in Michigan who is leading a protest to re-open.

Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) to stay up to date on all the great segments from "Spicer&Co".

“Spicer&Co” is back every night this week at 6p and 9p on Newsmax. I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here (https://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) .

https://youtu.be/_Rie-3GMW6k?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193
Our weekly wrap video has all the highlights from this week on "Spicer&Co." The media, the latest antics from the White House press corps & selective editing. The dismissal of the General Flynn case & DOJ's corruption with Jay Sekulow & Rep Jim Jordan. Lastly reopening the country, Sen. Rick Scott urges everyone to buy American & Rep Riggleman discusses struggles of small businesses. Check it out.

** Help Support the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer
------------------------------------------------------------

This month I've teamed up with Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193)

In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer (https://seanspicer.com/giving-back/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk has been canceled. So instead you can get a Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to benefit this great cause.

Check out Cameo here (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) and learn more about PanCan here (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) .

** Leading America
------------------------------------------------------------
In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. Its even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now.

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=aa3f36de9c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_05_18_03_54&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-aa3f36de9c-68212193) !

Thanks,

Sean

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Cory Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

Cory Booker was an incredibly dynamic leader throughout the Democratic presidential primary last year. His optimism and patriotism made him a standout figure in the debates, and his kind-hearted nature has shone through to all of us. I know that Joe Biden is a stronger nominee because of what Cory Booker contributed to the primary process. [**But let's not forget that Cory's still running for high public office.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1707/3e0906/78df5840/3e30d82a/787966300/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-booker?refcode=20200518_TK_Booker&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+But+lets+not+forget+that+Corys+still+run&utm_campaign=20200518_FR_TK_Booker&source=20200518_FR_TK_Booker") His campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate from New Jersey needs our support, which is why I'm writing to you today. Cory's running to keep fighting for justice and opportunity for all Americans -- and his campaign isn't taking donations from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or fossil fuel and pharmaceutical executives, so he relies on support from people like you to fund it. **Times are uncertain right now, and I know it's not always possible to make a donation. If you can afford it, will you chip in $15 or more right now directly to Cory Booker's campaign to help keep him in the U.S. Senate?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $15**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1707/3e0906/78df5840/3e30d829/787966300/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-booker?refcode=20200518_TK_Booker&amount=15&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+15&utm_campaign=20200518_FR_TK_Booker&source=20200518_FR_TK_Booker")
---
| [**DONATE $25**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1707/3e0906/78df5840/3e30d828/787966300/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-booker?refcode=20200518_TK_Booker&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=20200518_FR_TK_Booker&source=20200518_FR_TK_Booker")
---

clean_body: | | Derek, Cory Booker was an incredibly dynamic leader throughout the Democratic presidential primary last year. His optimism and patriotism made him a standout figure in the debates, and his kind-hearted nature has shone through to all of us. I know that Joe Biden is a stronger nominee because of what Cory Booker contributed to the primary process. "" His campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate from New Jersey needs our support, which is why I'm writing to you today. Cory's running to keep fighting for justice and opportunity for all Americans -- and his campaign isn't taking donations from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or fossil fuel and pharmaceutical executives, so he relies on support from people like you to fund it. Times are uncertain right now, and I know it's not always possible to make a donation. If you can afford it, will you chip in $15 or more right now directly to Cory Booker's campaign to help keep him in the U.S. Senate? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" If now's not the right time for you to donate, consider following Cory on "" and "", and sharing his posts so your friends and family see his hard work. Every little bit makes a difference. Thanks for everything you're doing -- it means a lot to me. -Tim * | "" "" ""

This will be a brief and uplifting virtual gathering for our supporters, volunteers, donors, and allies. [RSVP to register for the Celebration Here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31v/5_stkzOhQ_GAVrVymImMtA/h2/jdI9kDDbrkaJUaG3q0pePhPt7QU-2FslfCZWD0LJNGjZhFjoYofss6LzwO9w34HiK2Z2-2BSLH1EZjaAhn-2FNdaSctkwQD7QDLT6pvEqOMXqT-2B6SJt4yiY3tnMeE6vHVDenkKMdxE65K912u3eg-2BLA0kqNp533walCkdzt-2FmAdEkAevbo9DubYGSCWrIz1I9dbHi7-2BjLIlTlNpvMQWT983BEbOI1pQjKf3esE7Tbj9EptRUYSRd9NC36OOoqpqUc3e9Gv5BBJ1Rtdm8NF4cUnIJU-2FBfEg6IdqEZS9FSX2sEvTXU01J0pa-2FXNA5mZoPo73CQo-2FerJRI6H5emtKxFE5GNvq7YAB7A-2FoofGWNtfBNnz2r2k-3D/QkJO).

**Thank you** for taking a stand, and being part of this trailblazing movement. Thank you for everything you have given to this campaign: money, time, passion, courage. No matter the outcome tomorrow night, we must celebrate that we've built something unprecedented in Oregon politics, and the dynamics in our district will never be the same. We likely won't know the final result of the election tomorrow night as polls close, but we will know this: We mounted this first competitive primary since 1986, one unlike any ever seen before in Oregon's 4th district. We did it without any corporate PAC money or lobbyist cash. Together, we did what naysayers said could not be done: We took a stand. So it's our time to celebrate! Thank you again for your support. Onward to Election Day, Doyle Canning **P.S. Our volunteer team is working around the clock to make sure every ballot is cast by tomorrow night at 8 pm. If you can help us as a volunteer, making calls to voters from home, we need you today, tonight, and tomorrow. [RSVP Here. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31v/5_stkzOhQ_GAVrVymImMtA/h4/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCymdluNor1XThWCL-2BrmGHyVvEue0PxFIpLIwReEwbr1NxH9-2FYvHxKcPKMowzSPGXs52R8Y0CXDCyXL9gBc2VFfSyU8Xz97zONUP3sAWWkNJUX400etDYg-2Fc0DDDDJcrAE-2BQP40dKDyfT2AuCfCAs23wQpY4VXniqyFEjHza31zcSxyOsZiQjgiYMwMO-2BC3dWGevH6BXOiSm2ohqEnRZrdYLyH9aCez7pzahZGJkgpvtxqCt1cxR41XyemQyNXBTW6K7H1iGDmYD1bSUuGyNX4u2/MQkT)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: In it to win it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

The race is on! I filed my official paperwork at the Secretary of State's office this morning to be on the ballot for the August 4th Republican primary election as your candidate for the Kansas 2nd congressional district.

Before President Trump even took office, the Democrats and mainstream media began attacking him. It's more important than ever that we **Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi so President Trump can pass his agenda.**

There are less than three months to go before the election. If you haven't had the chance to learn about my campaign and the things I stand for, [check out my Contract with Kansas](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1d4a8590b4&e=1050d051da). These are my seven non-negotiable promises to you. _**You can count on me to continue to fight for what matters most to Kansans.**_
---

It's more important than ever that we Take Back the House from Nancy Pelosi so President Trump can pass his agenda. There are less than three months to go before the election. name: me, MJ Hegar
subject: we still need 4 more donors from your area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're counting on you to send a message to the Koch network: Don't mess with Texas.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007f/7f51f7bc/4e5dcbb9/4ef6b59d/1347929603/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | I'll be blunt, Peter, I just talked with my team and we still need 4 donors from your area today to get back on track and meet our goal. But before I ask for your support, let me explain why. (**[If you're already with me, you can chip in here >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007f/7f51f7bc/4e5dcbb9/4ef6b59c/1347929603/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200518.2nd__1429__&amount=10")**)

This month we learned that **a Koch-backed super PAC has pledged to spend SEVEN FIGURES to defeat me** and protect Mitch McConnell's Senate majority.

Now that's no small chunk of change. That's some serious money being spent by powerful special interests who want to see us lose so they can keep their puppet, Sen. John Cornyn, in Washington.

**Which brings me back to today 's goal: My finance team tells me we still need 4 more donors from your area and I'm hoping you can help.

If you're able, you can use the link below to make a donation of any amount today. Even $23, our average online donation, can make a big difference:

[mjfortexas.com/May-Goal](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007f/7f51f7bc/4e5dcbb9/4ef6b593/1347929603/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200518.2nd__1429__&amount=23")**

After nearly two decades in Washington, Senator John Cornyn has a nearly $13 million war chest funded largely by special interests and corporate PACs. I'm not taking money from corporate PACs, so I'm counting on this people-powered campaign.

We're counting on you to send a message to the Koch network: Don't mess with Texas.

Thanks, Peter!

\-- MJ
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007f/7f51f7bc/4e5dcbb9/4ef6b59c/1347929603/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200518.2nd__1429__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007f/7f51f7bc/4e5dcbb9/4ef6b592/1347929603/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1429&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007f/7f51f7bc/4e5dcbb9/4ef6b591/1347929603/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007f/7f51f7bc/4e5dcbb9/4ef6b590/1347929603/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").

body:
Did you see the last message from my team?
Friend, Did you see the last message from my team?
All we have to do is look at the current state of our Congress to see a clear picture of how Republicans and Democrats lead – or don’t lead.
Our Republican-led Senate has worked nonstop to provide relief and guidance for the American people during a time when they need it most.
**Meanwhile, Nancy Pelosi and other Democratic leaders in the House have continued to stall our efforts to get America back to work.**
This is exactly why we need a change of leadership in the House, and we have a chance to make it happen this November. Just look at the election results in Deep Blue California on Tuesday! Chip in below if you want to be a part of making that happen:
[**https://secure.winred.com/darinlahood/action-1210798**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=76975d0708ae43d89dc9b0f34a91c821&_e=tGfyUwx0qRQOSvfFzIuE73erkxXJNvNiszIQ6VeoYcS5O6BE2K8cQc1ntcDpOwlXFR-teF8ZH0aYNyv5YJfF88C87OVgdMdMZ1JoBoKOmolj9Mq64DfCinIC1rhLZojcRapwtw-04RorqmwXWu2eTWQGE3Ivwf9iIlf8Snag2siLKa29gUM8a5cv0y3vTA1XjtU13NMiMtC3jclzFQbHAzQAFoyuLb0XhQF3VZ3RfEeB3JKUDZJv639nrl1uslKLjtcpq1jmBXVGGjq75Lk-clJvEOe6bDoQbe1FcFWSYAVpvOzkpReT3gqi1aTz1mdbge7vCiZkxCiwZgEK2Ljer6Ial5yxePuSxmGlHV_vytQ7H5CtIkbiy9GqpxMYlYPM_PlBhEfa2e_nUr58A_Jf8K9Xo2c9l29dqXMsex1_1e5YTM3s6T8VdLKl7G8AoY6G4HdsO1Ea6WysDq0AGGIkYnVsSoLBVLxE5O3pS4cXAsA%3D)
Thank you for your continued support, Darin LaHood **\- - - Forwarded Message Below - - -**

**Subject: **This is what Democratic leadership looks like
**To:** **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=76975d0708ae43d89dc9b0f34a91c821&_e=tGfyUwx0qRQOSvfFzIuE73erkxXJNvNiszIQ6VeoYcS5O6BE2K8cQc1ntcDpOwlXFR-teF8ZH0aYNyv5YJfF88C87OVgdMdMZ1JoBoKOmolj9Mq64DfCinIC1rhLZojcRapwtw-04RorqmwXWu2eTWQGE3Ivwf9iIlf8Snag2siLKa29gUM8a5cv0y3vTA1XjtU13NMiMtC3jclzFQbHAzQAFoyuLb0XhQF3VZ3RfEeB3JKUDZJv639nrl1uslKLjtcpq1jmBXVGGjq75Lk-cqFGz4IUaL9bD88cQA70jv6YjX7alR0XuStbtQu55aoKnPyEtePt9VgxRSwgaKDhjWxjTouPs4gZo_ueoPGSUnjWcQghFHn8OCnOfOe66rfNNjtKOjUimZFAbgET-rz79QbCLO7lso_qIuDqzVToD3RNZWakXkbko4h-aIinVPwT-HK-fB5N5Kaolaa-HvyM2R8RoL5tCKTM2deiaTdQrE4%3D)**

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi thinks she’s doing our country a favor by keeping Congress at home – and out of the House – during this crisis.

All that does is rob Americans of their voice in Washington at a time when they need it most.

_**Friend, this is EXACTLY why we need conservatives to take back the House this year.**_
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=76975d0708ae43d89dc9b0f34a91c821&_e=tGfyUwx0qRQOSvfFzIuE73erkxXJNvNiszIQ6VeoYcS5O6BE2K8cQc1ntcDpOwlXFR-teF8ZH0aYNyv5YJfF88C87OVgdMdMZ1JoBoKOmolj9Mq64DfCinIC1rhLZojcRapwtw-04RorqmwXWu2eTWQGE3Ivwf9iIlf8Snag2siLKa29gUM8a5cv0y3vTA1XjtU13NMiMtC3jclzFQbHAzQAFoyuLb0XhQF3VZ3RfEeB3JKUDZJv639nrl1uslKLjtcpq1jmBXVGGjq75Lk-ckOxo9pCzOlE9QEpgzBwELFG9P_IUY-kG-xX0hWK8ExPoYgi1LljU071b085-ejfKsDXDkLjjAZ6AE4rQIFc7KTWDY1k9AYn0UuQSF3CgYOuyGl2KUx3NAyUzYVmZoXVw_hmkMxZMI-y4z1C-VMbgl3mJdIdfzO8FOUlxe-9EO6G-kylCA4YxhC0tcP3N7qUMXtYMo68lMDjF0jzoeKmMS8%3D)
**Americans are looking to Congress for crucial leadership to keep the economy intact and to keep workers supported right now. What do we see?**

_We see a Republican-led Senate hard at work – conducting hearings, holding votes, and mapping out our country’s next steps to recover from this crisis._

_On the other hand, the House Chamber that has been vacant is finally going to re-open much to Nancy Pelosi's dismay._

**Darin knows that Congress can – and needs to – serve the American people better than it currently does.****We need change, and it has to start at the top.**
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=76975d0708ae43d89dc9b0f34a91c821&_e=tGfyUwx0qRQOSvfFzIuE73erkxXJNvNiszIQ6VeoYcS5O6BE2K8cQc1ntcDpOwlXFR-teF8ZH0aYNyv5YJfF88C87OVgdMdMZ1JoBoKOmolj9Mq64DfCinIC1rhLZojcRapwtw-04RorqmwXWu2eTWQGE3Ivwf9iIlf8Snag2siLKa29gUM8a5cv0y3vTA1XjtU13NMiMtC3jclzFQbHAzQAFoyuLb0XhQF3VZ3RfEeB3JKUDZJv639nrl1uslKLjtcpq1jmBXVGGjq75Lk-cjSCDXczQEbcTF7TxfCfBkdjXnC5MDJ8jzuLLYfszV8IExwxclmCMiQda_kYDnZtz-42B2WSGDWvlG7U8QiuxkG_9K5gKe9EQvudm4xjbrDdyzbdclvlenrYoq_ngRPzgHJzaMtVBUPelMPjC17os_JiaFpU6nt9L1Aa-qVioCCgAG6cZlLfvj8k5bnFHrZf-O6zZ72VsBoDtLJ8ph208WQ%3D)
Every day that Nancy Pelosi kept the doors to the House Chamber closed resulted in more businesses closing their doors and more jobs lost. We can’t afford another two years of her being in charge.

_**Will you join Darin and make sure that we don’t have another two years of Pelosi in charge?**_
[**CHIP IN TO HELP CONSERVATIVES TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=76975d0708ae43d89dc9b0f34a91c821&_e=tGfyUwx0qRQOSvfFzIuE73erkxXJNvNiszIQ6VeoYcS5O6BE2K8cQc1ntcDpOwlXFR-teF8ZH0aYNyv5YJfF88C87OVgdMdMZ1JoBoKOmolj9Mq64DfCinIC1rhLZojcRapwtw-04RorqmwXWu2eTWQGE3Ivwf9iIlf8Snag2siLKa29gUM8a5cv0y3vTA1XjtU13NMiMtC3jclzFQbHAzQAFoyuLb0XhQF3VZ3RfEeB3JKUDZJv639nrl1uslKLjtcpq1jmBXVGGjq75Lk-cklllQpxCEXyzEOtxH9LYukYrzJG2F3Rg0nUuEA8Y4IszqlH2MscV3MTJ64pHUJjMnD5Sl15wH53ld25H6K9ObpFXh_UNmLq4eQXOHD5zAbkYPnmWt0Zk4OuSGS0EYKKW6AKOcchYm2zYHVPyccF4Bsm0ICdQkNJMoSlRcslhhX5jmX7pVE0AX986aYSFOL7ukLjvz37SKIK493n4_p2BX0%3D)
Thank you,

Team LaHood

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Parlato Pulls Illegal Ad, Continues “Negative, Nasty” Campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Late last week, Beth Parlato had to take one of her "nasty, negative" ads off the air on Friday after a news outlet reported the ad was a "[direct violation of Federal laws.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/mb892uFhgWgY4iadkEdn16cg/ecUfOxU0892xTJiAHf1rIJ892Q)_"_ You may have seen the newspaper story detailing it on Saturday in the Buffalo News. But we shouldn't be surprised Beth has decided she can't win by running a positive campaign on her own record. Instead, she's done what all desperate candidates do, centered her campaign on baseless attacks and the most negative ads she can run. In fact, Beth was forced to pull her illegal ad from the air just two days after the Republican chairs in the 27th district demanded that Parlato "suspend (her) negative campaign and promote your own candidacy rather than viciously attacking others." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/wMUtMom3iLGKPWt3u8mEOw/ecUfOxU0892xTJiAHf1rIJ892Q)) The only people Beth seems to attack are her fellow Republicans. First my colleague and friend Rob Ortt, and now me. The only person Beth hasn't attacked is my radical, liberal opponent- Nate McMurray. One county chair described Parlato's negative campaign as "the continuation of a destructive behavior pattern for her own self-promotion," and said it seems "like she's working with Nate McMurray." ([Buffalo News, 5/13/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/wMUtMom3iLGKPWt3u8mEOw/ecUfOxU0892xTJiAHf1rIJ892Q)) I'm committed to keeping this seat in Republican hands and I am proud to have the endorsement of President Trump. [Do me a favor, take a moment and watch our positive ad highlighting President Trump's endorsement and then share it with your friends.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/kJFfolZRVJ9XbG401MUC3Q/ecUfOxU0892xTJiAHf1rIJ892Q) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/ovVwnq0EAUGDT009Cl4grg/ecUfOxU0892xTJiAHf1rIJ892Q) [And if your means allow, will you help us keep this ad on the airwaves by chipping in $10, $25, or $50 today?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/0SL01z763toOphUSho3AnAFg/ecUfOxU0892xTJiAHf1rIJ892Q) Thank you for your continued support and I hope you and your family are staying safe. Don't forget to return your absentee ballot application or vote on June 23rd. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs

clean_body: | Friend, Late last week, Beth Parlato had to take one of her "nasty, negative" ads off the air on Friday after a news outlet reported the ad was a "" You may have seen the newspaper story detailing it on Saturday in the Buffalo News. But we shouldn't be surprised Beth has decided she can't win by running a positive campaign on her own record. Instead, she's done what all desperate candidates do, centered her campaign on baseless attacks and the most negative ads she can run. In fact, Beth was forced to pull her illegal ad from the air just two days after the Republican chairs in the 27th district demanded that Parlato "suspend (her) negative campaign and promote your own candidacy rather than viciously attacking others." () The only people Beth seems to attack are her fellow Republicans. First my colleague and friend Rob Ortt, and now me. The only person Beth hasn't attacked is my radical, liberal opponent- Nate McMurray. One county chair described Parlato's negative campaign as "the continuation of a destructive behavior pattern for her own self-promotion," and said it seems "like she's working with Nate McMurray." () I'm committed to keeping this seat in Republican hands and I am proud to have the endorsement of President Trump. Thank you for your continued support and I hope you and your family are staying safe. Don't forget to return your absentee ballot application or vote on June 23rd. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs * 5501 Camp Road P.O. Box 893 Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: New openings planned for the end of the month
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As we continue slowly reopening our economy, it's more important than ever that we continue to follow the public health guidance: stay home if you're sick, wash your hands, keep 6 feet of social distance, and don't leave your house without your face covering. I am proud of the way that Rhode Islanders have adapted to these new rules and kept the number of COVID-19 cases from spiking. While we must remain cautious, it's time for us to look at ways we can continue reopening safely.
Today, I want to talk about some of the restrictions we're hoping to roll back over the next few weeks: beaches, churches, and hairdressers.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NDeMTurUHz2pE7zNYBz4i_QxLjtUCpDwal8tI5WRJrnt-kGw0ym3LuyFE0X1EZauvrS2-Gywhy6Z0SiphB6MFNkBQQOVjyVfXjdj6HLXoqXc1yeoUCP6O4rFyj6XVJDBAPTqhemp7k3J0yB5TgPXQtUIdlDMY30Q6jYYFk95WEJwrxe7aYPRKFqoS1Ha-2L_Nk53aqyR270=&c=44ODmlX2ySGDPJT7sqZ_dvEMnb6dunZuTL2fBGujA4ScNXPOp-d50Q==&ch=nUG6v7Xfgyoxv0ut_yG_dTtBGqnLcrsPrk1bX0eQNUB45G7zG7HqHA==)

| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NDeMTurUHz2pE7zNYBz4i_QxLjtUCpDwal8tI5WRJrnt-kGw0ym3LuyFE0X1EZauvrS2-Gywhy6Z0SiphB6MFNkBQQOVjyVfXjdj6HLXoqXc1yeoUCP6O4rFyj6XVJDBAPTqhemp7k3J0yB5TgPXQtUIdlDMY30Q6jYYFk95WEJwrxe7aYPRKFqoS1Ha-2L_Nk53aqyR270=&c=44ODmlX2ySGDPJT7sqZ_dvEMnb6dunZuTL2fBGujA4ScNXPOp-d50Q==&ch=nUG6v7Xfgyoxv0ut_yG_dTtBGqnLcrsPrk1bX0eQNUB45G7zG7HqHA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| Beaches: One of our most treasured Rhode Island summer traditions is going to the beach. Today I'm excited to announce that we'll be opening two state beaches a week from today on Memorial Day--East Matunuck State Beach in South Kingstown and Scarborough State Beach in Narragansett.
As with all aspects of reopening, we cannot just flick on a switch and be back to the way things used to be. I only want to reopen beaches once, so we need to be cautious and careful:

* DEM will limit parking capacity to ensure that beachgoers have enough room to safely social distance.
* DEM will have staff present to welcome and accommodate visitors but there will not be lifeguards. The pavilions will be closed, as will concessions.
* People will need to stay in their own small groups and keep 6 feet of distance from others.

We're going to take it slow in Phase One as we prepare for the summer ahead. My expectation is that in Phase Two--which we hope will be in early June--all state beaches will be fully staffed, and pavilions and concessions will be open. But right now, we need more time to ensure we have the proper social distancing and safety protocols in place to keep everyone safe.
Churches: Like so many of you, my family and I have missed our faith community during this crisis. I'm grateful to all of our faith leaders who have worked so hard to find creative ways to support their congregations virtually over the past couple of months. Thanks to their valuable input and partnership, we are targeting beginning in-person faith services the weekend of May 30.
Like everything else, when services begin again, it will look different. We are still working through the guidelines, including the number of people and the ways in which to address common objects, such as prayer books or communion. This is a challenge, but we will find a way to make it work. I have full confidence that our faith leaders will be doing everything they can to ensure their congregations are following the rules and keeping each other safe.
Hairdressers: Unfortunately, because of the nature of this virus, close-contact businesses needed to be closed early and are some of the more difficult businesses to reopen. That said, we are working around the clock to get our hairdressers, barbers, and stylists back to work as quickly and safely as possible. It's my hope and expectation that we'll be able to get them up and running as soon as we enter Phase 2.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NDeMTurUHz2pE7zNYBz4i_QxLjtUCpDwal8tI5WRJrnt-kGw0ym3Lgj6-J2jaEaBF-Hu1-BvQZPoXHUtKwJe99uvzxrRdFNY8fF4hp4zXSklAIshjTfZyWWOpdkL_fyCQqhCbaXKJe5tEqH80krFDcGomvmRvUx_A_XJ4L0vyhbciiQuCH4gVYqxb9aUnCMjjMZU2VoM7dIIQ9RbKPRybeiW0ns_KEpw1Hct9uJF0rs=&c=44ODmlX2ySGDPJT7sqZ_dvEMnb6dunZuTL2fBGujA4ScNXPOp-d50Q==&ch=nUG6v7Xfgyoxv0ut_yG_dTtBGqnLcrsPrk1bX0eQNUB45G7zG7HqHA==)
---
| While I am excited to move forward with these reopenings, we must make sure that they happen in a way that is safe for all Rhode Islanders. I am profoundly concerned with the high incidence of COVID-19 in all communities of color. We know that communities of color have been impacted by health disparities for generations, and I charged Dr. Alexander-Scott with combating this inequity long before coronavirus showed up in our state. But now that mission has an even greater sense of urgency.
I have created an Equity Considerations Workgroup to guide every aspect of our state's response. Their job is to make sure that the resources we allocate, and decisions we make, always reflect the needs of all of our communities, particularly our communities of color. I'm proud to announce that we are expanding this group of to include representation of more communities of color across the state, including African Americans, African immigrants, Cape Verdeans, Haitians and Southeast Asians. We are all Rhode Islanders, and we will have a coordinated response to this virus that meets the needs of every community.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

Right now, our campaign is working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November.

And it's all thanks to grassroots donors.

Now, we're working every day to lay the groundwork for the general election, and we're just over halfway to the next FEC deadline.

**[What happens between now and November is powerfully important-- and every dollar counts. If you are in a place to donate, can you chip in $2 or whatever you can to help power our work to elect Democrats like Elizabeth?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852572e/45c30650/1cb7d12f2/66e9214f/1474237886/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjA5Rl9FR1JfR1JNX0NfMjAyMDA1MThfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR09F_EGR_GRM_C_20200518_V1S1_P")**

We're not going to beat Donald Trump and down-ballot Republicans by backing down -- we'll beat them by fighting back.

We fight back when we build a grassroots movement -- a movement that doesn't take money from fossil fuel giants, big banks, or Big Pharma.

We fight back when we call out corruption in Washington and elect Democrats to advocate for the biggest set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate.

We're asking for your help today to keep powering this fight. With your help, we can get back on track to meet our fundraising goal and keep growing this grassroots movement.

**[If you can during this time, please make a contribution today-- we'd be deeply grateful.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852572e/45c30650/1cb7d12f2/66e9214f/1474237886/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjA5Rl9FR1JfR1JNX0NfMjAyMDA1MThfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR09F_EGR_GRM_C_20200518_V1S1_P")**

Warren Democrats

name: Stacey Abrams Alert
subject: midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If you believe in the future we're fighting for, we need you to answer just one question before 11:59 p.m. tonight, but we're still missing your response:
| | | Have you heard, friend?
---
**Stacey Abrams - former Democratic nominee for governor of Georgia - has endorsed our campaign for U.S. Senate!**
When Stacey ran for governor back in 2018, the strength of her grassroots movement was _undeniable_. It was a wake-up call for Democrats across this country: Georgia was winnable _ _ and ready for change.

But the Republicans' systematic voter suppression stripped tens of thousands of people of their right to vote - and history will repeat itself unless we elect a leader who's committed to representing all Georgians, not just a lucky few.
That's why Stacey is ALL IN with Reverend Warnock in this fight to flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and elect the first black senator this state has _ _ ever seen. But we won't win without you, friend.

**If you believe in the future we're fighting for - one in which every single voice deserves to be heard - we need you to ****answer just one question before 11:59 p.m. tonight, but we're still missing your response:**
| | **Do you stand with Stacey Abrams in the fight to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate? **

name: Team Christy
subject: Ready for the rematch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We're already gearing up for our rematch against Mike Garcia this fall -- and our opportunity to flip this seat back from red to blue is stronger than ever.

In fact, a poll conducted shows Christy Smith at 48% to Mike Garcia's 46% -- **because we expect significantly higher turnout for our voters in November than in the special.**

With Garcia's voting record to scrutinize and the wave of Democratic voters showing up to the polls -- **we're confident in our chances of victory in November.**

**[But that doesn't mean we can slow down. In fact, it means we have to work harder and build up our momentum. Can you chip in today to make sure we start off in a great position in our fight towards November?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e49/2654073199/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e4a/2654073199/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e4b/2654073199/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e44/2654073199/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e45/2654073199/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e46/2654073199/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e49/2654073199/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full")
In a few months' time, Garcia will have taken votes that will show where his allegiances lie -- not to his constituents but to his political party, to his special interest donors, and to Trump.

**Our chances for the general election look stronger than ever -- so let's build on that momentum now and get started on our race to November.**

**[Pitch in $5 or whatever you can today to make it happen!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e49/2654073199/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full")**

Thanks so much for stepping up now. Let's make sure Mike Garcia knows he's just renting this seat -- it'll be ours for the keeping in November.

\-- Team Christy

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbac/29776869/98b2e08/569f2e49/2654073199/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MThfcGl2b3QyLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200518_pivot2-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
